data.name: Chromo XY
data.detailed_description:
Working alongside your colleague 'Rebecca' has always been a bit of a trial, as she just can't quit trying to push the boundaries of modern science. You have even begun to wonder if she is a scientist at all, or instead more of a mythical alchemist! Now your friendship and your life will be put to the test when you try her latest drug. One that incidentally turns you into a woman... Complete with all the aspects that entails.

Now you will have to truly walk a mile in another persons shoes, as well as their bras and panties too...

In this game you have your best friend Greg to help you and Rebecca searching for a cure. Though who knows which of these two will help you get through this or simply wish to... Ahem! study you closer.

  • A Visual Novel Game with Multiple Choices
  • Multiple different endings based on your decisions
  • Adult content and sex scenes to explore
  • Fun comedic moments to enjoy
  • Your decisions determine the events and story

* All characters included in the game are over the age of 18.

data.short_description: Chromo XY is an adult visual novel, gender bending story of a young man who inexplicably is transformed into a woman and must now walk in their shoes... As well as their bras and panties too!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Newer
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.50 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
